questionHtml: Determine the conclusion of the test, clearly justifying your answer.
markschemeHtml:
p-value =0.0984 0.0984037…       (M1)A1

0.0984>0.05          R1

Hence insufficient evidence to reject the manufacture’s claim.       A1
